name: Deathlands
short_description: Deathlands is a multiplayer turn-based survival game where you fight other players to remain the last man standing. If you only play one turn-based game, make it this one, because you'll love it!
detailed_description:
Deathlands is a multiplayer turn-based survival game where you fight other players to remain the last man standing. If you only play one turn-based game, make it this one, because you'll love it!

Features

  • Easy to learn tutorial!
  • Singleplayer!
  • Multiplayer!
  • Lot's of pixels!
  • Low system requirements, perfect for your laptop, you could even run it on a potato!
  • You can play with people from other continents without worrying about lag because it's turn-based!
  • A few minor bugs but don't worry, 50% of the time it works every time!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese
